info.title: LavBench API
info.description: Machine Learning Competition Platform — REST + SSE Endpoints

post.summary: Authenticate a user and receive a session cookie. Password must be sent as plaintext; the server hashes it. Sets httpOnly cookie `auth_token` on success. Rate limited: 5 failed attempts per username+IP per 60 seconds.

get.summary: Get a CSRF token for state-changing requests.

post.summary: Log out the current user. Clears the httpOnly cookie and revokes the JWT token.

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user's profile.
get_available_metrics <GET>

post.summary: register_competitor <POST>

get.summary: get_users <GET>

post.summary: register_user <POST>
import_competitors_csv <POST>

get.summary: list_backups <GET>

post.summary: force_backup <POST>

get.summary: stream_backup_status <GET>
download_backup_file <GET>
get_audit_logs <GET>

post.summary: reset_user_password <POST>
reset_all_challenge_passwords <POST>

get.summary: download_scores_csv <GET>
Download completed competitor submissions as a ZIP archive. Allows anonymized downloads when a stage or the competition has ended, and non-anonymized downloads once finalized.
get_detailed_worker_stats <GET>
stream_worker_stats <GET>
get_dead_letters <GET>
List all available challenges with their tasks and stages.

post.summary: Create a new competition with start/end times, resource limits, and privacy settings.

get.summary: Get detailed information about a specific challenge.

put.summary: Update the configuration of an existing challenge.

delete.summary: Permanently delete a challenge and all its tasks, submissions, and backups.

post.summary: Finalize the competition scores. Locks rankings and reveals competitor identities.

put.summary: Toggle reveal of private scores and manual points to competitors.

post.summary: Toggle archive state. Archived challenges are hidden from competitors.
Add a new stage to a challenge with its own deadline and score visibility rules.

delete.summary: Remove a stage from a challenge.

put.summary: Toggle reveal_results on a finalized stage.

post.summary: Finalize a specific stage. Locks stage scores.
Create a test stage before the competition starts for testing purposes.

get.summary: Export comprehensive competition results as CSV with ranks, scores, and audit log.
Export a challenge configuration as ZIP, including tasks, stages, and uploaded files.

post.summary: Import a challenge configuration from a ZIP archive.

get.summary: Download challenge audit logs dynamically as a JSON stream.

post.summary: Upload and parse a Jupyter Notebook (.ipynb) to preview cells.
Submit parsed code cells for a task.

get.summary: Get paginated submissions for a challenge.
Get details of a specific submission.

post.summary: Select a submission as the final one for scoring.

get.summary: Stream live logs for a submission using Server-Sent Events (SSE).
Download a competitor's final selection or highest-scoring submission.
Get the leaderboard for a specific challenge.
Stream live updates to the challenge leaderboard using Server-Sent Events (SSE).

post.summary: Save manual points for a user in a challenge. Jury members only.

get.summary: API endpoint.

put.summary: Update an existing task configuration including files and evaluator scripts.

delete.summary: Remove a task and all its submissions from a challenge.

post.summary: Create a new evaluation task with resource limits, metrics, and test data files.

get.summary: Download a resource file attached to a task.

post.summary: Submit code cells for execution under a specific task.

get.summary: List submissions for a specific task with pagination.
Get cached leaderboard data for a specific task.
Stream live task leaderboard updates via SSE.
Stream live task submission updates via SSE.
Get current worker cluster health status with specs.
Stream worker cluster health status via SSE.

post.summary: Worker callback to report submission status and scores.

get.summary: Worker endpoint to securely download task resource files.
List all active task configurations for worker image pre-building.
List all HuggingFace datasets used by active challenges for worker preloading.
get_task_hf_key <GET>

post.summary: report_build_error <POST>
receive_worker_logs <POST>

get.summary: Get the competitor documentation guide.
Get the jury documentation guide.

Health check for Docker and load balancer monitoring.
